2026-05-25.patch_summary: This patch adds a new manual page for the UFFDIO_SET_MODE ioctl, which allows userfaultfd feature bits to be toggled at runtime. The patch documents the uffdio_set_mode struct and its serialization against in-flight page faults, enabling a single userfaultfd to switch between async detection and synchronous eviction without re-registering its ranges.
